versions.version_description: Corrected to power chords, added fills.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Hit Me With Your Best Shot
Stuck In The Middle With You
I Was Made For Lovin You

content:
[Intro]

(drums start)

[ch]Ab[/ch]

[ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch] (x3)


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                    [ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]Db[/ch]                [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]
  Your love is like a tidal wave, spinning over my head,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                    [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]Db[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
  drowning me in your promises, that are left unsaid.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
  You're the right kind of sinner, to release my inner fantasy.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
  The invincible winner and you know that you were born to be.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                      [ch]Ab[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
don't you mess around with me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                      [ch]Ab[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
don't you mess around with me.[/tab]

No! No! No!


[Instrumental]

[ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch] (x2)


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Db[/ch]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]  [ch]Eb[/ch]
   Your love has set my soul on fire, burning out of control.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                  [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Db[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch]
  You taught me the way of desire, now it's taken its toll.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]           [ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
  You're the right kind of sinner, to release my inner fantasy.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]      [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
  The invincible winner and you know that you were born to be.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                      [ch]Ab[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
don't you mess around with me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                      [ch]Ab[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
don't you mess around with me.[/tab]

No! No! No!


[Instrumental]

[ch]Fm[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch] (x2)


[Break]

[tab]e|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
B|------------------------------------------------------------------------|
G|------------------------------1-0--------------0------5---5---5---------|
D|1-3------------1-0-1-3-----------3-1-------------3----------------------|
A|----3-1----------------3--1---------4-3-1-3-4------33--33--33---3-(x12)-|
E|--------4-3--1----------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                       [ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
You're the right kind of sinner, to release my inner fantasy.[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Fm[/ch]             [ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
The invincible winner and I know that you were born to be.[/tab]


[Chorus] (first two lines a cappella)

You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker,

don't you mess around with me.
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                     [ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
You're a heartbreaker, dream maker, love taker[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Db[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
don't you mess around with me. (x3)[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Db[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
(repeat)[/tab]
